tools.name: messages_send
tools.description: Send an iMessage or SMS to a phone number or email address.

recipient.description: Phone number (e.g. +1 555-555-5555) or Apple ID email of the recipient

invoke.script:
tell application "Messages"
  set targetService to 1st service whose service type = iMessage
  set targetBuddy to buddy "{{recipient}}" of targetService
  send "{{body}}" to targetBuddy
end tell
return "Message sent to {{recipient}}"

tools.name: messages_list_recent_chats
tools.description: List the names of the most recent message conversations.

count.description: Number of recent chats to return (default 10)

invoke.script:
tell application "Messages"
  set chatNames to {}
  set maxCount to 10
  set allChats to chats
  set total to count of allChats
  if total < maxCount then set maxCount to total
  repeat with i from 1 to maxCount
    set thisChat to item i of allChats
    set participants to name of thisChat
    copy participants to end of chatNames
  end repeat
  return chatNames as string
end tell
